attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
MRT.ACCRUAL_STATUS_CODE, 
MRT.AMOUNT_BILLED, 
MRT.CREATED_BY, 
MRT.CREATION_DATE, 
MRT.CURRENCY_CODE, 
MRT.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_DATE, 
MRT.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE, 
MRT.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_TYPE, 
MRT.DELIVER_TO_LOCATION_ID, 
MRT.DELIVER_TO_PERSON_ID, 
MRT.DEPARTMENT_CODE, 
MRT.EMPLOYEE_ID, 
MRT.GES_UPDATE_DATE, 
MRT.GLOBAL_NAME, 
MRT.LAST_UPDATED_BY, 
MRT.ORGANIZATION_ID, 
MRT.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID, 
MRT.PO_HEADER_ID, 
MRT.PO_LINE_ID, 
MRT.PO_LINE_LOCATION_ID, 
MRT.PO_RELEASE_ID, 
MRT.PO_UNIT_PRICE, 
MRT.QUANTITY, 
MRT.QUANTITY_BILLED, 
MRT.REASON_ID, 
MRT.RECEIPT_EXCEPTION_FLAG, 
MRT.REQUEST_ID, 
MRT.REQUISITION_LINE_ID, 
MRT.REQ_DISTRIBUTION_ID, 
MRT.SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID, 
MRT.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID, 
MRT.TRANSACTION_DATE, 
MRT.TRANSACTION_ID, 
MRT.TRANSACTION_TYPE, 
MRT.UNIT_OF_MEASURE, 
MRT.VENDOR_ID, 
MRT.VENDOR_SITE_ID,
MRT.PRIMARY_QUANTITY,
MRT.PRIMARY_UNIT_OF_MEASURE, 
MRT.SOURCE_DOC_QUANTITY, 
MRT.SOURCE_DOC_UNIT_OF_MEASURE,
MRT.PARENT_TRANSACTION_ID,
MRT.DESTINATION_TYPE_CODE
FROM
MF_RCV_TRANSACTIONS MRT
WHERE  MRT.GES_UPDATE_DATE
>TO_DATE('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
